name: dashboard-v005-astro
description: Account-review dashboard, same data-unique-* contract, authored as Astro components and rendered to static HTML. Three builds from one source: --mode=live (platform artifact, zero JS), --mode=preview (local mock-data host, no network), and --mode=live-local (real Streamable HTTP to a local no-auth mcp_sqlite_excel server).

scripts.build:preview: npm run mock:data && DASHBOARD_MODE=preview astro build --outDir dist/preview
scripts.build: npm run build:live && npm run build:preview
